name: Rise of Humanity
short_description: Battle enemy bots, plan your strategy to complete missions, collect, upgrade and merge powerful cards to save humanity in this tactical turn-based game!
detailed_description:
Rise of Humanity Supports Tilt Five™!

Did you ever want to get closer to the robot busting action in Rise of Humanity? To be able to almost touch the Drones and Puppies? Experience Rise of Humanity
from a new perspective in augmented reality (AR) with Tilt Five™!

Visit Tilt Five's website to find out how to bring Rise of Humanity alive on your tabletop!


UPDATE 2 OUT NOW!

It has:
😎A new playable character
🐥A new enemy type
🏭A new environment
🃏Animated limited edition card
💥New daily challenge missions
➕and more!


JOIN OUR DISCORD


Just Updated


Thrilling new missions, a special Limited Edition card, new battle goals and battle conditions, different weather conditions, new gold cards skins, Twitch connection and more in the first Rise of Humanity update!


About the Game

Rise of Humanity is a tactical turn-based deck-building card game set in a dystopian future where an AI has taken over the world. Take control of a band of loveable misfit heroes that survived the onslaught decades ago and help them save humankind!



Each hero (and enemy) is controlled by a deck of cards, allowing them to attack, dodge, move and so on. Use remarkable weapons such as an exploding bunny to slay hordes of crushers, robot puppies and drones!



Collect, upgrade and merge cards to build decks for each of your heroes and get them stronger as the story missions progress. Be the master of the playing field by planning your strategy wisely!



For now, the game has 2 modes:
• In Story Mode, guide your trusty team of characters on a mission to destroy the rogue AI.
• In Daily Challenge Mode, fight in 3 different missions with 3 randomly determined heroes under battle conditions that change every day. Climb the daily and monthly leaderboards and become our champion.

Rise of Humanity Supports Tilt Five™!




Level up your game night with tabletop holograms! The Tilt Five™ holographic gaming system
transforms tabletop and video games into vibrant holographic 3D environments. Using the
Tilt Five™ augmented reality (AR) glasses, Gameboard, and Wand controller, you can immerse
yourself – and friends – in experiences like never before. Visit Tilt Five's website to find out how to bring Rise of Humanity alive on your tabletop!

supported_languages:
English*, Dutch, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Polish
*languages with full audio support
